title: Step S-SWQT-0021: 数据表格语义模型与表头关联修复

items.statement: 恢复 DataTable/ServerDataTable 的单一原生 table model、列头 scope 与可验证的表头—数据单元格关联。

inScope: TableHead 默认 scope=col 且允许 override
ServerDataTable 从 header/body 双 table 合并为单 table，保留滚动、固定布局、排序、筛选和 load-more
outOfScope: 视觉 token 或产品数据模型变更

items.researchEvidence: R-SWQT-0001；WHATWG table content model；ARIA/HTML native semantics。

items.axisPositioning: required: HTML content model + accessibility association + dense-table layout/performance。
items.axisSplitSnapshot: 独立高风险 Step，因为表格结构、scroll/sticky 和 public DOM 共享不可拆验收，但与基础语义/表单迁移不同。

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: 单一 table/thead/tbody 数量；th scope；row/cell counts；sort button；filter/load-more；scroll/sticky layout；Axe。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: Feature AC5/AC8/AC9 -> component DOM assertions + ServerDataTable browser scenarios + typecheck/build。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: HTML table model -> DOM contract；sticky/scroll -> browser E2E；public props -> typecheck；accessibility -> Axe + role queries。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: 验证 columns widths、header filter、summary overlay、empty state、load-more sentinel、sorting direction 与 viewport body height。
testDrivenDesign.coverageMetric: all ServerDataTable branches already demonstrated plus new single-table invariant
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 真实屏幕阅读器的复杂表格导航与超大数据性能需人工抽查。
testDrivenDesign.followUp: S0022 运行全矩阵并记录 residual risk。

items.explanationSyncBrief: 组件文档明确 table model 和 scope 规则；不把布局原因当作拆分语义表的理由。
items.problemDefinition: ServerDataTable 将列头和数据放在两个独立 table，浏览器无法天然建立 th/td 关联；基础 TableHead 也不提供明确 scope。
items.requirementsDefinition: 单一 table 包含 colgroup/thead/tbody；通过 sticky header 保留体验；列头默认 scope=col；现有排序/筛选/滚动/加载行为不退化。
nonGoals: 不引入 grid role 模拟原生 table。
不重写数据获取或分页协议。

plainLanguage.unclear: 页面上看起来对齐的两个表是否等价于一个表。
plainLanguage.why: 视觉对齐不建立语义关联，辅助技术把它们视为两个无关表格。
plainLanguage.outcome: 同一个 table 同时拥有列头和数据，CSS 负责 sticky/scroll。
plainLanguage.prose: 让表格在 DOM 中也确实是一张表。

options.name: 单一 table + sticky thead
options.cuttingPoint: 结构正确，布局交给 CSS。
options.risk: 滚动条宽度和 sticky 背景需回归。
options.rejectWhen: 浏览器矩阵证明 sticky 无法满足现有体验。

options.name: 保留双 table，用 id/headers 手工关联
options.cuttingPoint: 布局不变，人工跨表引用。
options.impact: 部分 AT 可能关联，但文档仍是两个 table。
options.risk: 复杂、脆弱且不符合原生 content model 意图。

recommendedOption.rationale: 单一 table 是最直接、最强的 HTML 语义和浏览器关联证据。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: 现有 CSS 能用 sticky header 保持体验。
recommendedOption.assumptionChanges: 若性能回归，先优化 CSS/contain，不退回语义分裂。

granularity.whySmallEnough: TableHead 默认与 ServerDataTable 合并共享表头关联不变量和同一 E2E 证据。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: 分开会出现基础 scope 已改但主数据表仍语义错误的不可验收中间态。
granularity.splitSignals: 若合并触发独立虚拟化/性能架构变更，则拆出后续 Feature。
granularity.coarseJustification: 需要原子地证明 semantic model + dense layout。

readiness.reason: 结构目标、CSS 策略、行为分支与测试映射明确。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: ServerDataTable semantic DOM/layout, TableHead default scope, Portal sortable demo/browser proof, HTML source gate.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: One table contains colgroup/thead/tbody; th defaults scope=col; sticky header, sort state and existing scroll/load-more hooks remain.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: Source table-count invariant, rendered table count/scope/sticky/sort/Axe, catalog/design/type baseline.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: Single structural patch can be reverted, but split tables must not return without standards evidence.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Removed the separate header table and moved sticky TableHeader into the same scrollable table as TableBody; retained shared colgroup, scrollRef, sentinel/load-more and more-indicator; Portal demo now exercises controlled sorting; source gate rejects a second table.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: Browser and assistive technology now receive one native table tree with directly associated column headers and data cells.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: Data fetching, row identity, infinite-scroll protocol, viewport sizing and visual token system are unchanged.

changeSurface.documentationAnchors: Existing Table/ServerDataTable catalog contract remains accurate.
changeSurface.dataOrMigrationAnchors: Rendered DOM contracts change from two table elements to one.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Use sticky thead inside the existing overflow container; preserve a single colgroup and all body/load-more descendants.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: Custom bodyMaxHeightClassName now constrains the combined header+body scroll box; full visual matrix must confirm acceptable row visibility.

validationReferences.notes: 8 component contracts + 2 documents; ServerDataTable single-table invariant included.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: bun run --cwd examples/portal test:browser --grep 'ServerDataTable keeps headers'
validationReferences.notes: light/dark 2/2; one table, two scope=col headers, sticky thead, ascending->descending sorting, Axe.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: prior catalog/design gates + current Vite build from Playwright webServer
validationReferences.notes: Catalog parity and Portal production build remain green.
Known source-highlight literal-type errors only; no diagnostic in touched table files.

blocker.reason: Direct structural, sort and Axe proof passed.
blocker.recoveryTrigger: Full viewport/browser or packed consumer shows sticky/scroll regression.
blocker.residualRisk: Row viewport height and sticky paint across all projects await S0022 full matrix.

items.projectFactUpdateCandidates: not-needed: no new command/path/config; public DOM fact is captured by component source, browser test, and HTML standards gate.

items.guardedRiskDomain: Public table DOM semantics plus sticky/scroll/sort behavior.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Change is limited to the single-table structure, source invariant and representative sortable demo/test; Step=implemented; standards evidence and full brief present.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: inspected data fetching, row identity, sentinel, scrollRef and viewport hooks; they remain wired and unchanged.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Combined header/body scroll height can alter visible row count.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Source gate rejects split tables; light/dark browser test proves one table, scope=col, sticky thead, sorting and zero Axe violations.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: checked for a second table, missing scope, detached header and sort-state regression; none observed.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Full viewport/screenshot/infinite-scroll matrix deferred to S0022.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Source Feature link, stable path and implementation evidence complete; no new project command/path fact; public behavior is guarded in source/test.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: known type baseline does not involve table files; no stale split-table documentation found.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: No standalone coverage artifact; accepted target-driven structural/browser coverage.

items.conditionalGates: DDL not-applicable；sibling repeated skip rollup deferred to final Step.
items.ssotImpactPrerequisite: passed: runtime source/test are the current table contract; no separate project SSOT requires update.
items.followUp: Run complete Portal/consumer browser matrix and packed consumer in S0022.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0021-数据表格语义模型与表头关联修复.json
items.validationSummary: Single-table source gate + light/dark DOM/scope/sticky/sort/Axe 2/2 passed；full matrix follows in S0022.
items.testCaseSummary: One native table, two scoped headers, sticky thead and controlled sort transition verified.
items.coverageSummary: target-driven structural and browser coverage；no standalone coverage artifact.
items.rootMount: Stable workflow Step path plus package Table/ServerDataTable catalog entry.

requirementAudit.evidence: Source invariant and rendered DOM count/scope proof.

requirementAudit.requirement: Sort, scroll and load-more contract preserved
requirementAudit.evidence: Sort browser proof; scrollRef/sentinel/load-more source wiring unchanged.
requirementAudit.risk: Infinite-load scenario not separately exercised in the small catalog demo.
requirementAudit.followUp: Existing full suites/packed consumer plus future dedicated fixture if regression appears.
